# CWE-79 positive: reflected XSS via text/template
lang: go
file: CWE-79-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"text/template"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
// Vulnerable line: user input rendered into HTML template without escaping
// (text/template doesn't auto-escape unlike html/template).
func GreetVisitor(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Query("name")
	tmpl := template.Must(template.New("page").Parse("<html><body><h1>Hello {{.}}</h1></body></html>"))
	tmpl.Execute(c.Writer, name)
}
